paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close, but a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes a story from simplywall.st about the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns, and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form on July 15 about the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13 about the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and three new social posts in the last 24 hours.
